title: Better Death Screen
description: This Mod improves your Deathscreen! When dying you can copy coordinates and see in which dimension you died! And there are so much more informations
body:
# Better Death Screen

**Tired of Minecraft's boring death screen? Better Death Screen replaces it with a fully detailed, informative screen so you never lose track of where or how you died.**

---

## Preview


![Death Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/319644f8de301722e4700ad63a743841c8e09155_0.webp)



---

## Features

### Death Location
Never lose your items again — your exact coordinates and dimension are displayed front and center.



![Coordinates and Dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/822128e1d613b38d1275c96c752c9bd9d03cdfa3.png)



### Death Cause
See exactly what killed you — whether it was a Zombie, fall damage, fire, or the void.



![Death Cause](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75fc1ba459618ca0c89f1c4836895c0026c4bc12.png)



### Lost Inventory
A full read-only grid of everything you were carrying at the time of death — hover over items for tooltips.



![Inventory Grid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b86d5a0d52090b9f0063a34cd983c1e56d66aa0_0.webp)



### Copy Coordinates
One click copies your death coordinates to clipboard — paste them in chat or a waypoint mod instantly.

### Fully Configurable
Toggle every feature individually via Mods like Mod Menu



---

## Installation

1. Install [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) or [NeoForge](https://neoforged.net/)
2. Download **Better Death Screen** and drop it in your `mods/` folder
3. *(Fabric only)* Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
4. Launch and die responsibly

---

## Compatibility

| Minecraft | Fabric | NeoForge |
|-----------|--------|----------|
| 1.20.1    | yes    | yes      |
| 1.21.1    | yes    | yes      |
| 1.21.8    | yes    | yes      |
| 1.21.11   | yes    | yes      |
| 26.1      | planned    | planned      |

**Client-side only** — works on any server, no server installation needed.

---

## Issues & Feedback

Found a bug or have a suggestion? Open an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/TheMFCRaft1/Better-Death-Screen).

---

*Made by PhiroStudios*
